mapper.select:
SELECT TO_CHAR(EC.APPLY_NO) AS APPLY_NO, EC.PERSON_ID, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(EC.AR_DATE_STR, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS AR_DATE_STR, EC.ITEM_NO, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(EC.ITEM_NO, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS ITEM_NAME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(EC.PERSON_ID, EC.AR_DATE_STR, 'IN') AS INDOOR_TIME, GET_AR_MAC_TIME(EC.PERSON_ID, EC.AR_DATE_STR, 'OUT') AS OUTDOOR_TIME, TO_CHAR(EC.FROM_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS FROM_TIME, TO_CHAR(EC.TO_TIME, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI') AS TO_TIME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME( GET_AR_SHIFTNO(EC.PERSON_ID, EC.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS SHIFT_NAME, NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_START_TIME(EC.PERSON_ID, EC.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), '') || '~' || NVL(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(GET_AR_SHIFT_END_TIME(EC.PERSON_ID, EC.AR_DATE_STR, #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI'), 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI'), '') AS WORK_TIME, EC.APPLY_REASON, EC.AFFIRM_FLAG, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(EC.AFFIRM_FLAG, #{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS AFFIRM_FLAG_NAME, EC.HR_COMMENT, TO_CHAR(EC.WORK_HOUR) AS WORK_HOUR FROM ESS_CARD_APPLY_TB EC WHERE EC.PERSON_ID = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND EC.ITEM_NO IN ('141443', '141441', '141442', '14015448') AND EC.ACTIVITY = 1
AND EC.AFFIRM_FLAG = #{affirmFlagSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND EC.AR_DATE_STR >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
AND EC.AR_DATE_STR <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{endDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'YYYY/MM/DD')
ORDER BY EC.AR_DATE_STR DESC, EC.CREATE_DATE DESC, EC.APPLY_NO DESC
